label: Less clutter, more focus on your home screen
items: Removed the big statistics wall from the dashboard — the completion-rate, streak, yield and activity scoreboards that looked busy but rarely changed what you'd do next.
Your home now leads with what's actually actionable: today's tasks, what needs attention, and your garden at a glance.
The detailed view's side panel is now just your daily brief and the week ahead — calmer and quicker to read.
